response.original_title: Wisconsin's Own Horror and Sci-Fi Shorts
response.overview: ghoststory A ghost follows a woman home, unnerving experiment from WFF veteran Alex Jacobs.  Sylvia's Stone Neglected by partner, Sylvia discovers magical stone in woods with kaleidoscopic powers. Spectacular flashes of color and frenzied editing invigorate this disturbing, pulse-pounding thriller.  Walking at Night Man attempts to calm himself with a walk at night, sees ghost.  Sherman Park Zombie in Milwaukee park.  The Man In The Sky Won't Let Me Sleep Frightening figure looms over insomniac. Creepy delight, allusions to oddball late night television.  What Is That?! Monster's POV of hikers.  Daniel Needs To Leave Surreal nightmare, hilarious frustrating experience, struggle to leave gathering filled with overly polite Midwesterners.  The Lingering Exorcist brought in to dispel spirit of dead wife.  Keepsake Rocky marriage, husband unveils latest creation to wife. Impressive special effects, time-travel fable, fallibility of nostalgia and memory.
response.title: Wisconsin's Own Horror and Sci-Fi Shorts
